# HelloSDE — System Design Mastery

## About
HelloSDE (hellosde.com) is a system design learning platform for senior/staff engineers preparing for FAANG interviews. It covers 16 modules, 201 real-time problems, and 300+ visual architecture diagrams.

## Content Structure

### Concepts (16 Modules)
1. Foundations — FR vs NFR, scaling basics, serialization
2. Networking — OSI, TCP/UDP, HTTP, DNS, firewalls
3. Security — authentication, authorization, encryption
4. APIs & Communication — REST, gRPC, GraphQL, WebSocket, idempotency
5. Infrastructure — load balancers, API gateways, Docker/K8s, service mesh
6. Storage Systems — SQL, NoSQL, Elasticsearch, vector databases
7. Caching — Redis, CDN, cache invalidation, thundering herd
8. Messaging — Kafka, message queues, event sourcing, CQRS
9. Consistency — CAP theorem, consensus, sagas, conflict resolution
10. Scalability — sharding, consistent hashing, rate limiting, backpressure
11. Data Pipelines — CDC, ETL, stream processing, data warehouses
12. Distributed Systems — fault tolerance, leader election, ZooKeeper
13. Observability — logging, metrics, tracing, monitoring
14. AI Systems — LLM serving, RAG, embeddings, AI gateway, agents, guardrails
15. Key Numbers — latency, throughput, back-of-envelope estimation
16. Decision Flowcharts — choosing APIs, databases, messaging, caching

### Problems (201 across 29 systems)
Real-world scale problems from: Slack, WhatsApp, Discord, Netflix, Uber, Google, Meta, Amazon, Stripe, Kafka, Redis, Elasticsearch, and more.

## URL Structure
- Homepage: https://hellosde.com/
- Concepts: https://hellosde.com/system-design-cheatsheet/
- Problems: https://hellosde.com/realtime-system-design-problems/
- Individual concept: https://hellosde.com/system-design-cheatsheet/[number]-[topic].html
- Individual problem: https://hellosde.com/realtime-system-design-problems/[module]/[problem].html

## Contact
Website: https://hellosde.com
